text:
name LICS_AMT), 
indicates the amount paid by Part D low-income subsidy for the PDE. Although this is sometimes 
considered a beneficiary payment (since it is made on behalf of a beneficiary), we have included the LIS 
payments in the Part D Medicare Payment amount (reference variable called PTD_MDCR_PMT). 

The value will be null if the beneficiary was not enrolled in Part D or did not use any Part D drugs during 
the year.
